bullets: Lead a team of 4 data scientists building ML products across marketing, operations, and finance.
Architected the company-wide feature store and ML platform, reducing model deployment time from weeks to days.
Delivered a churn prediction model that directly contributed to an 18% reduction in annual churn.
Established experimentation standards and A/B testing infrastructure adopted across 3 product teams.
Built NLP pipeline processing 50K+ documents/day with 94% classification accuracy.
Developed demand forecasting models reducing inventory costs by $4M annually.
Mentored 3 junior data scientists and drove adoption of reproducible research practices.
Presented quarterly insights to C-suite stakeholders; translated complex analyses into actionable strategy.
Built predictive models for client campaigns across retail and financial services verticals.
Implemented automated reporting pipelines saving 20+ analyst-hours per week.
Led migration from SAS to Python/R, standardizing the analytics codebase.
Owned end-to-end analytics for growth and product teams using SQL and Excel.
Designed and analyzed A/B tests to optimize onboarding flow, improving D7 retention by 12%.
Built the company's first KPI dashboard, consolidating metrics from 5 data sources.
